title: State of World Population
additional-note: We consider the 1989 issue likely to be the first issue with an active US copyright, though we are not certain about this. Spot-checks of 1980s issues did not turn up copyright notices.  Issues published prior to 1989 without such notices are likely to be public domain in the United States, since they were most likely published in a timely manner in the US, where the United Nations is headquartered.  Issues published in March 1989 or later may be automatically copyrighted with or without a copyright notice, and to our knowledge the UN does not routinely waive copyright on its non-legislative publications.
